name: AndroidTestClii
description: Typed wrappers for AndroidTestClii device automation commands.

tools.name: doctor
tools.label: AndroidTestClii doctor
tools.description: Run local environment and optional target-device health checks.

tools.name: devices
tools.label: AndroidTestClii devices
tools.description: List attached Android devices.

tools.name: screen_dump
tools.label: AndroidTestClii screen dump
tools.description: Dump the selected Android device UI hierarchy.

tools.name: snapshot
tools.label: AndroidTestClii snapshot
tools.description: Capture an agent-style compact snapshot and refresh local refs.

tools.name: snapshot_capture
tools.label: AndroidTestClii snapshot capture
tools.description: Capture a snapshot with explicit compact or full diagnostic semantics.

tools.name: diff_screenshot
tools.label: AndroidTestClii diff screenshot
tools.description: Compare two PNG screenshots and optionally write a diff overlay artifact.

tools.name: diff_snapshot
tools.label: AndroidTestClii diff snapshot
tools.description: Compare the current snapshot against the last session snapshot by node signature.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.label: AndroidTestClii screenshot
tools.description: Capture an agent-style screenshot, optionally overlaying recent snapshot refs.

tools.name: logs_start
tools.label: AndroidTestClii logs start
tools.description: Start Android logcat artifact capture by writing a marker.

tools.name: logs_stop
tools.label: AndroidTestClii logs stop
tools.description: Stop Android logcat capture and write the marker-filtered logs artifact.

tools.name: logs_clear
tools.label: AndroidTestClii logs clear
tools.description: Clear Android logcat.

tools.name: logs_mark
tools.label: AndroidTestClii logs mark
tools.description: Write an Android logcat marker message.

tools.name: logs_path
tools.label: AndroidTestClii logs path
tools.description: Report the default and active Android log artifact paths.

tools.name: logs_doctor
tools.label: AndroidTestClii logs doctor
tools.description: Return Android logcat capture diagnostics and next steps.

tools.name: trace_start
tools.label: AndroidTestClii trace start
tools.description: Start Android atrace capture and store trace state in the session.

tools.name: trace_stop
tools.label: AndroidTestClii trace stop
tools.description: Stop Android atrace capture and write a trace artifact.

tools.name: perf_collect
tools.label: AndroidTestClii perf collect
tools.description: Collect a procfs memory, CPU, and process snapshot.

tools.name: network
tools.label: AndroidTestClii network
tools.description: Extract HTTP and URL clues from logcat or a logs artifact.

tools.name: settings
tools.label: AndroidTestClii settings
tools.description: Write and verify Android settings for animations, wifi, airplane, or permissions.

tools.name: push
tools.label: AndroidTestClii push
tools.description: Send an Android broadcast push-style event with JSON extras.

tools.name: trigger_app_event
tools.label: AndroidTestClii trigger-app-event
tools.description: Start an Android deep-link intent for an app event payload.

tools.name: boot
tools.label: AndroidTestClii boot
tools.description: Confirm an Android device is online and persist the CLI session.

tools.name: ensure_simulator
tools.label: AndroidTestClii ensure-simulator
tools.description: Confirm an Android simulator/device is online and persist the CLI session.

tools.name: click
tools.label: AndroidTestClii click
tools.description: Click a coordinate, selector target, or @eN snapshot ref.

tools.name: fill
tools.label: AndroidTestClii fill
tools.description: Focus a selector target or @eN ref and type text.

tools.name: get
tools.label: AndroidTestClii get
tools.description: Read text, attrs, or bounds from a selector target or @eN ref.

tools.name: wait
tools.label: AndroidTestClii wait
tools.description: Wait for a selector kind/value and return structured diagnostics.

tools.name: batch
tools.label: AndroidTestClii batch
tools.description: Run multiple agent-style AndroidTestClii steps serially.

tools.name: replay
tools.label: AndroidTestClii replay
tools.description: Replay a .ad script with context/env variables and screenshot expectations.

tools.name: test
tools.label: AndroidTestClii test
tools.description: Run one or more .ad replay scripts and optionally write a JUnit report.

tools.name: gesture
tools.label: AndroidTestClii gesture
tools.description: Run gesture pan/fling/replay or return a gesture record template.

tools.name: record_start
tools.label: AndroidTestClii record start
tools.description: Start sessionized Android screen recording.

tools.name: record_stop
tools.label: AndroidTestClii record stop
tools.description: Stop sessionized Android screen recording and pull the artifact.

tools.name: react_native
tools.label: AndroidTestClii react-native
tools.description: Return structured unsupported status for React Native-specific helpers.

tools.name: runtime_status
tools.label: AndroidTestClii runtime status
tools.description: Inspect AndroidTestClii runtime, snapshot helper, and last snapshot state.

tools.name: runtime_clear
tools.label: AndroidTestClii runtime clear
tools.description: Clear cached runtime capability state without deleting the selected session.

tools.name: session_status
tools.label: AndroidTestClii session status
tools.description: Inspect the active AndroidTestClii session and stale-device diagnostics.

tools.name: session_list
tools.label: AndroidTestClii session list
tools.description: List active AndroidTestClii sessions.

tools.name: install_from_source
tools.label: AndroidTestClii install-from-source
tools.description: Install a local APK using the agent-style source command.

tools.name: back
tools.label: AndroidTestClii back
tools.description: Press Android back.

tools.name: home
tools.label: AndroidTestClii home
tools.description: Press Android home.

tools.name: appstate
tools.label: AndroidTestClii appstate
tools.description: Return the current foreground Android app using the agent-style surface.

tools.name: screen_screenshot
tools.label: AndroidTestClii screen screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot from the selected Android device.

tools.name: screen_size
tools.label: AndroidTestClii screen size
tools.description: Read Android screen dimensions from the selected device.

tools.name: screen_orientation
tools.label: AndroidTestClii screen orientation
tools.description: Read or set Android screen orientation on the selected device.

tools.name: element_find
tools.label: AndroidTestClii element find
tools.description: Find Android UI elements matching a structured selector.

tools.name: element_exists
tools.label: AndroidTestClii element exists
tools.description: Check whether Android UI elements match a structured selector.

tools.name: element_wait
tools.label: AndroidTestClii element wait
tools.description: Wait for an Android UI element matching a selector target or snapshot ref target.

tools.name: element_click
tools.label: AndroidTestClii element click
tools.description: Click one Android UI element matching a selector target or snapshot ref target.

tools.name: element_set_text
tools.label: AndroidTestClii element set text
tools.description: Set text on one Android UI element matching a selector target or snapshot ref target.

tools.name: element_get_text
tools.label: AndroidTestClii element get text
tools.description: Read text from one Android UI element matching a structured selector.

tools.name: element_clear_text
tools.label: AndroidTestClii element clear text
tools.description: Clear text on one Android UI element matching a structured selector.

tools.name: input_tap
tools.label: AndroidTestClii input tap
tools.description: Tap absolute screen coordinates on the selected Android device.

tools.name: input_swipe
tools.label: AndroidTestClii input swipe
tools.description: Swipe between absolute screen coordinates on the selected Android device.

tools.name: input_press
tools.label: AndroidTestClii input press
tools.description: Press an Android key name such as back, home, or enter.

tools.name: input_text
tools.label: AndroidTestClii input text
tools.description: Send text input to the selected Android device.

tools.name: toast_get
tools.label: AndroidTestClii toast get
tools.description: Read a toast message from the selected Android device.

tools.name: device_clipboard_get
tools.label: AndroidTestClii device clipboard get
tools.description: Read Android device clipboard text.

tools.name: device_clipboard_set
tools.label: AndroidTestClii device clipboard set
tools.description: Set Android device clipboard text.

tools.name: app_current
tools.label: AndroidTestClii app current
tools.description: Return the current foreground Android app.

tools.name: app_launch
tools.label: AndroidTestClii app launch
tools.description: Launch an Android app package.

tools.name: app_stop
tools.label: AndroidTestClii app stop
tools.description: Stop an Android app package.
